title: rosa × damascena var. variegata
intro: Rosa × damascena var. variegata, also known as the variegated damask rose, is a variant of the damask rose plant, characterized by its distinctive striped or mottled foliage. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. Rosa × damascena var. variegata has been traditionally used to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, among other health benefits. The plant's medicinal properties are often extracted and prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
